Defendant Shulgin Acquisition Group, Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay And To Compel Arbitration.
Off Calendar Sep-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:
Lawrence Ecoff, Esq., 310-887-1850, appearing for EVN Investments, Plaintiff
Gary Blackman, Esq., 312-476-7536, appearing for Nikolay Shulgin, for Defendant

ARGUED. The Court stated that it was informed that the Plaintiff did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. Mr. Blackman reported that he waives notice and that he is ready to argue his postition. Mr. Ecoff stated that he contested to the tentative ruling and provided his oral argument in support of his position. Mr. Blackman provided background information.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Shulgin Acquisition Group, Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay And To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. This action shall proceed to arbitration as to all parties. The action is not dismissed at this time. Parties may file their respective petitions to confirm/vacate arbitration award in this action at the conclusion of the arbitration proceeding. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
